steps.title: Recognize what 'format' refers to
steps.content: The prompt asks to describe the FORMAT of the poem — its structural composition, not publication details, themes, or the author's reasoning.

steps.title: Identify the structural description
steps.content: Choice B directly describes the poem's structure: a sequence of five haiku. A overgeneralizes to all poems in the book and omits the specific count; C discusses publication and theme rather than structure; D explains the author's motivation rather than the actual format. This matches choice B — B is correct.
